testcase.classname: Auth Controller findUserByUsername-should return user when found
testcase.name: should return user when found

testcase.classname: Auth Controller findUserByUsername-should return null when user not found
testcase.name: should return null when user not found

testcase.classname: Auth Controller createUser-should create user with hashed password
testcase.name: should create user with hashed password

testcase.classname: Auth Controller verifyPassword-should verify correct password
testcase.name: should verify correct password

testcase.classname: Auth Controller verifyPassword-should reject incorrect password
testcase.name: should reject incorrect password

testcase.classname: Auth Routes POST /auth/verify-should verify valid credentials
testcase.name: should verify valid credentials

testcase.classname: Auth Routes POST /auth/verify-should return 401 for invalid password
testcase.name: should return 401 for invalid password

testcase.classname: Auth Routes POST /auth/verify-should return 400 for missing credentials
testcase.name: should return 400 for missing credentials

testcase.classname: Auth Routes POST /auth/register-should register new user
testcase.name: should register new user

testcase.classname: Auth Routes POST /auth/register-should reject existing user
testcase.name: should reject existing user

testcase.classname: Auth Routes POST /auth/register-should reject short password
testcase.name: should reject short password
